hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *package-lock.json|*/dist/*) echo "Blocked: $f is generated (lockfile/build output) - edit package.json or source instead" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts) out=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1) || { echo "$out" | head -30 >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; }
